name: ent-nobridge-indirect-neutral
note: FINAL UNIT iteration 2, proving the bridge is LOAD-BEARING: the SAME indirect-reference quote WITHOUT the rule-text bridge stays neutral - the quote alone ('wrinkle-relaxing injections') cannot establish 'prescription only medicine', which is exactly the U1 resume-3 verbatim 'neutral' the bridge exists to resolve.
